name: Matt Schafer
title: Broker | Owner | Senior LO
bio: Matt Schafer is the founder and owner of Good People Mortgage Company. With years of experience in the mortgage industry, Matt is dedicated to providing personalized mortgage solutions to every client. He believes in honest communication, competitive rates, and a seamless lending experience from application to closing.

name: Morgan Lauck
title: Loan Officer
bio: Morgan Lauck brings extensive experience as a licensed loan officer specializing in helping clients find the best mortgage solutions for their unique situations. Whether you're a first-time homebuyer or looking to refinance, Morgan is committed to guiding you through every step of the process with care and expertise.
